title: Jace (disambiguation)
content:
'''Jace''' refers to a number of things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Bairdon Jace]]''', a [[Jedi]] [[Padawan]]
*'''[[Jace Rucklin]]''', a [[First Order]] [[pilot]]
**'''[[Jace Rucklin's hangar]]'''
*'''[[Jacen Syndulla]]''', the son of [[Kanan Jarrus]] and [[Hera Syndulla]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Jace]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]]
*'''[[Jace (mechanic)|Jace]]''', a [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] from [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]]
*'''[[Jace Dallin]]''', a career soldier
*'''[[Jace Forno]]''', a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]
*'''[[Jace Lorrin]]''', a [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] [[Viceprex/Legends|viceprex]]
*'''[[Jace Malcom]]''', a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] military commander
*'''[[Jace Paol]]''', a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]]
*'''[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo's]]''' childhood nickname
*'''[[Ja'ce Yiaso]]''', an [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]]
*'''[[Bairdon Jace/Legends|Bairdon Jace]]''', a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]
*'''[[Bror Jace]]''', a member of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]

===Starships===
*'''''[[Haven Jace]]''''', a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]]
